Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Stipulated Consent Judgment And Injunction As To Lucy Goods, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH SAN FRANCISCO ATTORNEY DAVID CHIU, PEOPLE OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Stipulated Consent Judgment And Injunction As To Lucy Goods, Inc.

The People's unopposed Motion for Stipulated Consent Judgment and Injunction as to Defendant Lucy Goods, Inc. is GRANTED.

The requirements of Code of Civil Procedures sections 664,6 and 579 and good cause appearing, the court grants the People's motion for stipulated consent judgment and injunction as to Defendant Lucy Goods, Inc.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Stipulated Final Judgment And Injunction As To Defendant Northerner Scandinavia, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH SAN FRANCISCO ATTORNEY DAVID CHIU, PEOPLE OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Unopposed Motion For Stipulated Final Judgment And Injunction As To Defendant Northerner Scandinavia, Inc.

2 - The People's unopposed Motion for Stipulated Consent Judgment and Injunction as to Defendant Northern Scandinavia, Inc. is GRANTED.

The requirements of Code of Civil Procedures sections 664,6 and 579 and good cause appearing, the court grants the People's motion for stipulated consent judgment and injunction as to Defendant Northern Scandinavia, Inc.

The court will execute the order portion of the [Proposed] Stipulated Consent Judgment and Injunction as to Defendant Northern Scandinavia, Inc. submitted by the People with their moving papers.

Prior to the time set for hearing, the People shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
